<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Vonage\Application; use function trigger_error; class RtcConfig { public const EVENT = 'event_url'; protected array $webhooks = []; public function setWebhook($type, $url, $method = null): self { if (!$url instanceof Webhook) { trigger_error( 'Passing a string URL and method are deprecated, please pass a Webhook object instead', E_USER_DEPRECATED ); $url = new Webhook($url, $method); } $this->webhooks[$type] = $url; return $this; } public function getWebhook($type) { return $this->webhooks[$type] ?? null; } }
